channel.title: Home Barista Lab
channel.description: Fresh takes for home coffee enthusiasts.

item.title: The state of Espresso in 2026
item.description: A field report on espresso: where things stand, and what home coffee enthusiasts should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Pour-over without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to pour-over for home coffee enthusiasts — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "home espresso dial in" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "home espresso dial in" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why home coffee enthusiasts are rethinking Roasting
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how home coffee enthusiasts approach roasting — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Gear on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in gear — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Pour-over: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping pour-over for home coffee enthusiasts.
